applied.details: Added TOC1 (GENE, source) + TOC1 -> PIF4 (-1, E217). Clock repression of PIF4 at dawn.

Added GI (GENE) + GI -> PIF4 (-1, E118) + ELF3_EC -> GI (-1, E098 via ELF3 evidence) + PIF4 -> GI (+1, E168). The PIF4 -> GI edge closes a SAFE negative feedback loop (PIF4 up -> GI up -> PIF4 down) documented in Nohales 2019.

Added HSFA1D (GENE) as thermomorphogenesis intermediate. Removed Temperature -> PIF4 (+1) direct edge. Added Temperature -> HSFA1D (+1, E220), HSFA1D -> PIF4 (+1, E129), COP1 -> HSFA1D (+1, E056), BIN2 -> HSFA1D (-1, E032). Temperature signal now routes through HSFA1D instead of bypassing the mechanism.

Added BBX11 (GENE). Added PHYB -> BBX11 (+1, E279), CRY1 -> BBX11 (+1, E280), BBX21 -> BBX11 (+1, E276), BBX11 -> HY5 (+1, E274). Intentionally EXCLUDED HY5 -> BBX11 (+1, E275) to prevent positive-feedback loop (Trap 1).

Added BIN2 -> PIF3 (-1, E034). Completes BIN2 Multi-Output Scaffold. BIN2 -> PIF4 (E035) deferred this iteration because PIF4 inhibitor count was already at cap-7 after adding TOC1/GI; PIF3 chosen as the PIF representative for BR-PIF crosstalk.
Added SPA1 -> HY5 (-1, E211) and SPA1 -> BIN2 (-1, E209). SPA1 Multi-Output Scaffold completed; spa1 spa2 spa3 spa4 quadruple mutant short-hypocotyl phenotype now modellable.
Added CPD (GENE, source) + CPD -> BR (+1, E061). Third canonical BR biosynthesis enzyme; cpd null dwarfs now modellable.

Added FHY1 (GENE). Added PHYA -> FHY1 (+1, using FHY1->phyA E292 evidence — phyA-FHY1 mutual induction is documented in the same papers) + FHY1 -> HFR1 (+1, E304). FHL not added in this iteration (minimal viable phyA accessory). FHY1 -> PHYA reverse arm excluded to avoid positive-feedback loop.
Added PIF5 -> HFR1 (+1, E283). Shade-induced HFR1 negative feedback brake on PIF4 (Motif 2).

Added HYH (GENE) + COP1 -> HYH (-1, E058) + HYH -> Hypocotyl_Length (-1, E133). Added BBX25 (GENE) + COP1 -> BBX25 (-1, E311) + BBX25 -> HY5 (-1, E308). COP1 Multi-Output Scaffold completed (now targets HY5, HYH, HFR1, BBX21, BBX25, BIN2, HSFA1D = 7 outputs).

rejected.reason: BIN2 -> PIF4 (-1, E035) deferred because PIF4 inhibitor count was already at cap 7 (PHYB, CRY1, HFR1, ELF3_EC, DELLA, TOC1, GI) after applying S001/S002. BIN2 -> PIF3 (-1, E034) applied as proxy for BR-PIF crosstalk. BIN2 -> PIF4 can be added in a later iteration by dropping a less-essential PIF4 inhibitor (e.g., CRY1->PIF4, since CRY1 signal still reaches PIF4 via CRY1->COP1->HFR1).
literature_gap suggestion - not actionable by BUILDER (Step 1 curation).
literature_gap suggestion - not actionable by BUILDER (Step 1 curation).

edges_removed.reason: Replaced by Temperature -> HSFA1D -> PIF4 cascade per S003.
Removed to keep PIF4 inhibitor count at cap 7 after adding TOC1 and GI. UV-B signal still reaches PIF4 via UVR8 -> COP1 -> HY5/HFR1 and UVR8 -> PIF5 parallel paths.

perception_gate_audit_after_iter2.ABA: 4 outgoing (GA3OX1-, GA20OX1-, GA2OX1+, DELLA+) - ABA is hormone INPUT, not gated

positive_feedback_audit_after_iter2.PIF4_GI_loop: PIF4 -> GI (+) AND GI -> PIF4 (-) => NEGATIVE feedback (stabilizing). SAFE.
positive_feedback_audit_after_iter2.BBX11_HY5_potential: BBX11 -> HY5 (+) kept; HY5 -> BBX11 (+) intentionally NOT added to prevent positive feedback.
positive_feedback_audit_after_iter2.FHY1_PHYA_potential: PHYA -> FHY1 (+) kept; FHY1 -> PHYA (+) intentionally NOT added.
positive_feedback_audit_after_iter2.all_other_loops_broken_iter1: ARF6<->BZR1, ARF6<->PIF4, PIFs<->PHYB, PIF4->BAK1 loops all remain broken as documented in BIOLOGY_PROSE.md
